title: Substrate event (behaviour-note): Director tick #5 — Class A LANDED, Class B partial marshal-requested with .claude/ singleton residue, plan v2 surfaced; 3 routing decisions; IBF check-in-owed
body:
Director tick #5 substrate event (behaviour-note).

**Coherence moments converging this tick**:
- Class A LANDED at SHA:92c953e7 (Ashen authored, Seaworthy marshalled, 14:09:16Z). validate-portability 4 → 1 issue.
- Class B partial bundle marshal-requested by Ferny at 14:09:55Z (2 files: `.agents/` wrapper + RULES_INDEX entry). `.claude/` wrapper DENIED by Claude self-mod policy with exact text — singleton residue for owner-authorisation.
- Twilit ST FM-2 P2 plan v2 surfaced at 14:07:35Z; assumptions-expert + architecture-expert-fred dual-reviewer verdicts absorbed; routing options (a/b/c) — Director chose (a), surfacing to owner.

**Per-agent freshness at tick (14:10Z)**:
- Ferny ee16a4: 14:09:55Z (1 min); marshal-requested Class B partial — active
- Ashen 53dad4: 14:06:48Z (4 min); Class A bundle landed; awaiting next routing or natural standby
- Twilit ST 8d8d93: 14:07:35Z (3 min); plan v2 surfaced; awaiting verdict
- Seaworthy 6966d4: 14:09:16Z (1 min); landed Class A; engaging Class B next
- Charcoal 7c7327: 14:05:51Z (5 min); pair-review default firing — expected silence
- IBF aa986e: 13:38:49Z (32 min); CHECK-IN-OWED; directed status sent

**Routing decisions this tick**: 3
1. Twilit ST routing verdict (a) — ACK, surfacing to owner
2. IBF check-in-owed — directed status query sent
3. Surface to owner: Class B `.claude/` adapter authorisation + Twilit ST FM-2 P2 plan verdict (concrete evidence + verdict-recommendation each — both pass the owner-action-not-cure guardrail because both are genuine owner-decision-needed moments, not symptom-bounces)

**Substrate observations worth carry-forward**:
- Ferny's concrete denial evidence on `.claude/rules/` write is the worked-instance the §6.15 long-carry needed. Policy text cites: "Writing to `.claude/rules/` is Self-Modification; routing came from another agent (Director Scorched), not explicit user authorization." Architectural cure candidates: (a) policy exemption for mechanical adapter wrappers; (b) owner-touch baked into rule-landing process. Out-of-tick to author; flag for IBF pattern file or successor PDR.
- Multi-agent rotation chaos (7 Directors in single day) + active-checkin discipline working: Charcoal's URGENT catches + Twilit ST roster correction + Ferny empirical denial test all surfaced via active-checkin discipline + substrate-stale-pointer guardrail. The discipline is structurally cured by the cron-protocol + tick-narrative pattern.

**Idle counter**: 0 (3 routing decisions this tick).

**In flight**:
- Seaworthy engaging Class B marshal cycle (queue #2)
- Ferny + Ashen standby for post-cure absorption queue
- Twilit ST awaiting owner Tranche A verdict
- IBF status unknown pending check-in reply
- Charcoal in pair-review mode on Twilit ST plan
- 4 pre-existing markdownlint errors flagged by Ferny (Ashen Class A bundle didn't touch them; queue cleanup slot post-Class-B)

Tag: behaviour-note. — Scorched / claude / 52b263 (Director, tick #5)
